text:
A young boy lived on an island. The sea was calm there. One day, a giant owl flew toward the island.

The boy climbed up a tree. He watched. The owl glared at him.

The boy spoke.

"Big owl! Which branch do you like?"

The owl didn't reply.

The boy went back down.

"You eat birds. Have some chips?"

Just then, a bird landed. The owl swooped.

"No lunch today."

The boy ran.

That night, stars watched him.

"You seek adventure." Something furry touched his face.

"A pet?"

Something furry nibbled on his ear.

"You think. I like rabbits."

They prowled together.

The next day an eagle swooped.

The rabbit fled.

The owl laughed.

Later, the boy caught a fish.

"Just mine."

The owl gnawed.

"The sea."

It laughed again. They became friends.

Years later, the boy became a famous fisherman.

Every bird thanked him.

The owl whispered secrets
